text.tspan: Image Segmentation Fundamentals: Point, Line, and Edge

rect.data-narration: Point detection involves identifying a specific location or point within an image. This can be achieved using techniques such as feature detection algorithms (e.g. SIFT, SURF) or corner detection algorithms (e.g. Harris corner detector).

path.data-narration: Example: In an image of a building, point detection can be used to identify the location of a specific feature such as a doorway or window. An arrow marker can be used to connect the point to the feature

rect.data-narration: Line detection involves identifying a line or edge within an image. This can be achieved using techniques such as edge detection algorithms (e.g. Canny edge detector) or line detection algorithms (e.g. Hough transform).

path.data-narration: Example: In an image of a road, line detection can be used to identify the edges of the road. An arrow marker can be used to connect the line to the road feature

rect.data-narration: Edge detection involves identifying the edges or boundaries within an image. This can be achieved using techniques such as Canny edge detector or Sobel operator.

path.data-narration: Example: In an image of a landscape, edge detection can be used to identify the edges of trees or buildings. An arrow marker can be used to connect the edge to the feature

rect.data-narration: Thresholding is a technique used to divide an image into its constituent parts or objects of interest. This can be achieved using techniques such as Otsu's thresholding or simple thresholding.

path.data-narration: Example: In an image of a building, thresholding can be used to identify the objects of interest such as doors or windows. An arrow marker can be used to connect the objects to the building feature

rect.data-narration: Point, line, and edge detection are techniques used to identify specific features within an image. These techniques can be used together to improve the accuracy of image analysis and processing.

path.data-narration: Example: In an image of a road, point, line, and edge detection can be used together to identify the edges of the road, the lines of the road, and the points of interest such as traffic lights or billboards. An arrow marker can be used to connect the features to the road feature
